---
title: "IHC method — analysis home"
site: workflowr::wflow_site
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: false
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

This site collects the reproducible analyses behind the IHC method study —
spatial single-cell IHC, bulk RNA-seq, cell-type deconvolution, clinical data,
and the image-registration / segmentation benchmarks that validate the pipeline.

Each analysis below is a standalone page. Start with the **Overview**, then dive
into whichever thread you need. Pages marked _(in progress)_ are authored but not
yet knit to HTML, so their links may not resolve until the next site build.

## Start here

- [Overview](overview.html) — project scope, the datasets in play, and how the
  pieces fit together.

## Method validation & QC

The core "method" contribution: how cells are assigned to tumour annotations,
how IHC markers are quality-controlled, and how the imaging pipeline is benchmarked.

- [Annotation membership QC](annotation_membership_qc.html) _(in progress)_ —
  sf point-in-polygon membership vs. the `Out_of_annotation` flag, compared per cell.
- [IHC marker QC](ihc_qc.html) _(in progress)_ — per-marker distribution and
  bimodality checks on `ihc_data`, with no external reference.
- [Registration accuracy](registration_accuracy.html) — accuracy of the image
  registration used to align modalities.
- [Pipeline benchmarks](benchmarks.html) — Mirage image-processing benchmark:
  resource scaling, registration cost/accuracy, and segmentation-method
  comparison from the SLURM sweep.

## Molecular & clinical analyses

- [Clinical data](clinical_data.html) — integration of the clinical table with
  the imaging and molecular inputs; defines tumour-annotation membership via the
  pathologist geojson (sf point-in-polygon).
- [Clinical data — per-annotation flag](clinical_data_per_annotation.html) — the
  same analysis with membership taken from the FlowPath `Out_of_annotation` flag in
  the per-annotation exports, falling back to the whole-slide csv for patients with
  no per-annotation file. Ignores `per_annotation/old/`.
- [Clinical data — per-annotation flag, `old/` overlay](clinical_data_per_annotation_old.html)
  — identical to the above except that `per_annotation/old/` overrides the
  top-level file for the annotations it re-exports, so the diff between the two
  isolates the effect of those re-exports.
- [Bulk RNA-seq](bulkRna.html) — DESeq2-based differential expression over the
  bulk RNA inputs.
- [Deconvolution](deconvolution.html) — cell-type deconvolution (immunedeconv),
  bridging bulk RNA (CRF-id) and IHC (patient) id spaces via the clinical table.
- [Marker exclusivity](exclusivity.html) _(in progress)_ — per-patient marker
  co-expression / exclusivity from the whole-slide `ihc_data`.
- [Tumour border / invasive margin](periphery.html) _(in progress)_ —
  immune composition in the invasive-margin buffer around tumour annotations.

## About

- [About](about.html) — study and site background.
- [License](license.html) — reuse terms for the code and results.
- [Source code](https://github.com/sceriff0/ihc_method) — GitHub repository.
